title: GiantexUK Lawn Leveling Rake 30”/36”/42”/46” x 10”, Powder Coated Steel Lawn Leveller with 77” Long Handle, Soil Leveling Tool for Garden Grass Golf Field Ground (46” x 10”, Silver)
features: Flexible Leveling Rake: Our lawn leveling rake has a large ground plate to cover a large area, and allows easy removal of stones from the ground and breaking up lumps. The flexible U-joint provides additional flexibility when working on lawns and is perfect for all types of uneven ground.

Ergonomic Non-Slip Handle: This soil leveling tool is equipped with a 170 cm long handle, which improves work efficiency and avoids back pain caused by long time work. In addition, the upper part of the handle is non-slip to ensure a firm and comfortable grip.

Robust Construction: Our lawn levelers are made of powder coated steel to be extremely strong and durable, resistant to deformation and rust, suitable for long-term outdoor use. Meanwhile, rake head and handle are screwed together very tightly and can not easily detach or break.

Wide Application: The leveling tool makes gardening easier by helping you level the ground surface easily, ideal for all types of lawns in courtyards, gardens, pastures, farms, golf courses and football fields. You also can use this landscaping rake to level mother soil, sand, fertilizer and more.
Easy to Assemble & Store: The lawn lute is easy to assemble, you just need to prepare all the parts, follow the instructions. When not in use, the handle can be disassembled to save storage space.
description: Product Description Reasons you can buy Lawn leveling Rake from GiantexUK. 1- The 170cm long handle with non-slip design makes gardening easy and effortless. 2- Due to the use of stainless metal materials, our lawn leveling rakes have good durability and strength. 3- The flexible and wide rake head is suitable for a variety of uneven surfaces and makes your gardening work more efficient. Features: Removable handle for easy storage / Screwable design for easy installation / The wide rake head flattens your lawn / Flexible, rotatable U-joint for greater efficiency / Suitable for all types of lawns, including backyards, gardens and golf courses Color Green/ Black/ Silver Net weight 5/5.5/6/6.7kg Material Metal, PVC Handle Length: 170cm Plate Dimension: 75/91/10/117 x 25cm (L x W) Package Includes 1 x Lawn Leveling Rake, 1 x Instruction Outdoor Lawn Aerator Outdoor Lawn Aerator Outdoor Lawn Roller 63L Garden Lawn Roller 63L Garden Lawn Roller 27’’ Compost Spreader Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 34 4.2 out of 5 stars 34 3.9 out of 5 stars 41 4.3 out of 5 stars 46 4.3 out of 5 stars 46 4.2 out of 5 stars 41 Price £39.59 £ 39 . 59 £42.59 £ 42 . 59 £24.59 £ 24 . 59 £74.59 £ 74 . 59 £66.59 £ 66 . 59 £94.59 £ 94 . 59 Material Galvanized Steel, Metal, PP Galvanized Steel, Metal, PP Steel, PP Steel Steel Metal Net Weight 4.5kg 5 kg 3.5kg 13kg 14 kg 6.5kg Color Green Green Green+Silver Green Green Black Overall Dimensions 45 x 14 x 130cm (L x W x H) 53 x 14 x 130 cm (L x W x H) 45 x 21 x 126cm (L x W x H) 30 x 99 x 112cm(Dia x W x H) 99 x 30 x 137 cm (L x W x H) 68 x 124cm (L X H)
